empty_desc: Visit a business's store to add products to your cart.
title: My Cart
insufficient_balance: Your JamiiWallet balance isn't enough to pay for this order.
payment_note: Payment for products and services is made through JamiiWallet only - the amount is deducted immediately when you submit the order.
order_placed: Your order has been paid and submitted successfully!
order_failed: Failed to submit order. Please try again.
order_confirmed_desc: The seller will review your order shortly.
fulfillment_label: How Will You Receive the Item?
dropoff_address_placeholder: e.g. Uhuru Street, near the Central Market
dropoff_location_pending: We need permission to access your location to calculate the delivery fee.
no_quotes: Enter an address to see delivery options.
payment_note_delivery: Payment for the product and delivery will be held in escrow until delivery is confirmed by both you and the driver - only then are funds released to the seller and driver.
order_held: Order received - funds are held until delivery is complete!
order_confirmed_desc_delivery: Funds are held - they will be released to the seller and driver once delivery is complete and you confirm receipt.
delivery_details_required: Choose a delivery location and vehicle type.
multi_seller_note: Your items will be sent as separate orders to each seller.
identity_verification_required: You must verify your identity before buying.
credit_pickup_only: Credit is only available for self-pickup (PICKUP) for now.
cash_payment_note: Funds are not held online - pay in cash when you pick up the item. There is no escrow protection with this method.
cash_credit_conflict: Cash payment cannot be combined with credit terms.
order_placed_cash: Your order is confirmed - pay in cash when you pick it up!
order_confirmed_desc_cash: Pay in cash when you pick up the item at the shop - the seller will confirm once payment is received.
payment_note_mixed_cash: Some items will be paid in cash when picked up - the rest will be deducted from your JamiiWallet now.
